scripts.build: npm run build -w @zwavejs2homey/compiler && npm run build -w @zwavejs2homey/core && npm run build -w co.lazylabs.zwavejs2homey
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test -w @zwavejs2homey/compiler && npm run test -w @zwavejs2homey/core && npm run build -w co.lazylabs.zwavejs2homey
